parts.text:
No blocking issues found.

- The succeeded reconciliation updates now explicitly clear `cancel_requested_at` in both reconciliation paths in `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1629` and `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1959`.
- The non-reconciliation fallback when success races with cancel also clears it in `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1317`.
- The associated test assertion was updated to verify this (`state.cancelRequestedAt === null`) in `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.test.ts:949`.
- I also ran the worker test suite (`pnpm --filter @dayhaysoos/nimbus-worker test`), and `workspace-deployment-runner` tests passed with the rest of the suite.
